metaDescription: AI automation for real estate agencies and developers. Automate lead qualification, property inquiries, and CRM data entry.
description: Stop losing property leads to slow response times. AIFlowix builds custom AI workflows that instantly respond to inquiries, qualify buyers vs. renters, and automatically log details directly into your CRM.
solutions: WhatsApp AI for instant property details

faq.question: Can the AI show available properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we can connect the AI to your property database to recommend matching listings to leads instantly.

metaDescription: AI automation for recruitment agencies. Automate candidate screening, interview scheduling, and resume parsing.
description: AIFlowix transforms how staffing agencies operate. Our AI automations screen hundreds of resumes instantly, conduct preliminary WhatsApp interviews, and automatically schedule qualified candidates.

faq.question: Does AI screening introduce bias?
faq.answer: We build strict, skill-based parsing criteria to ensure candidates are evaluated purely on qualifications and experience, reducing human bias.

metaDescription: AI automation for healthcare providers. Automate patient scheduling, reminders, and basic triage.
description: Reduce no-shows and administrative burden. We build HIPAA-compliant (where required) AI workflows that handle appointment booking, send automated reminders, and answer basic clinic FAQs.

faq.question: Are your healthcare automations secure?
faq.answer: Yes, we prioritize data security and build automations that comply with relevant healthcare data protection regulations.

metaDescription: AI automation for manufacturing. Streamline supply chain updates, vendor communications, and inventory alerts.
description: Modernize your factory floor and back office. AIFlowix deploys AI systems that automate vendor PO generation, track inventory alerts, and streamline complex operational reporting.

faq.question: Can you integrate with legacy ERPs?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in bridging modern AI tools with legacy on-premise or cloud ERP systems via custom APIs or RPA.

metaDescription: AI automation for logistics companies. Automate dispatch tracking, driver communication, and customer updates.
description: Keep your fleet moving and your customers informed. We build automations that handle real-time tracking updates, driver dispatch alerts, and automated freight quote generation.

faq.question: Can the AI handle customer 'Where is my order' queries?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We build AI agents that query your tracking database and give customers instant updates 24/7.

metaDescription: AI automation for e-commerce brands. Automate customer support, order tracking, and cart recovery.
description: Scale your e-commerce brand without scaling your support team. AIFlowix builds AI agents that resolve WISMO (Where Is My Order) tickets instantly, handle returns, and execute automated cart recovery campaigns.

faq.question: Do you integrate with Shopify?
faq.answer: Yes, we build deep integrations with Shopify to allow AI agents to check order status, modify addresses, and process refunds.

metaDescription: AI automation for educational institutions. Automate student enrollment, lead nurturing, and campus FAQs.
description: Boost your student enrollment numbers. We automate the entire student lifecycle, from initial inquiry qualification to campus tour scheduling and automated fee reminders.

faq.question: Can the AI help students choose a course?
faq.answer: Yes, we can program the AI with your curriculum details to act as a virtual academic advisor for prospective students.

metaDescription: AI automation for law firms. Automate client intake, document drafting, and case updates.
description: Let your lawyers focus on practicing law, not admin work. AIFlowix builds secure automations for automated client intake, conflict-of-interest checks, and preliminary document drafting.

faq.question: Is client confidentiality maintained?
faq.answer: We strictly use enterprise-tier AI APIs (like OpenAI Enterprise) which guarantee zero data retention for model training, ensuring complete confidentiality.
